name: Ludo AI Game Assets MCP Server
what_it_does: Official MCP server from Ludo AI (Ludo-AI org) for AI-powered game asset generation. Enables AI agents to generate game sprites, 3D models, animations, sound effects, music, and voice content through Ludo's game asset generation API — integrating AI-generated game content into development workflows.
use_cases: Generating game sprites and character art from game development agents
Creating 3D model concepts and animations from game design agents
Generating sound effects and music for game levels from creative agents
AI-driven game asset iteration and variant generation from content pipeline agents
not_for: Production-quality AAA game assets (AI-generated assets may require artist polish)
Teams needing full artistic control over every pixel/polygon
Non-game content (focused on game asset types: sprites, game audio, etc.)
best_when: An indie game developer or game design agent needs to rapidly generate placeholder or production game assets — sprites, 3D concepts, audio — using Ludo's AI generation pipeline without individual creative tool expertise.
avoid_when: You need photorealistic AAA-quality assets or need full creative control. AI-generated game assets work best for rapid prototyping and indie projects.

auth.notes: Ludo AI API key required. Register at ludo.ai for access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free credits for testing; check ludo.ai for current limits
pricing.paid_tiers: Usage-based for production asset generation volume
pricing.notes: Ludo AI offers free credits for new users. Generation costs apply in production.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limited by Ludo API tier; generation takes seconds to minutes

known_agent_gotchas: Generation latency is significant (seconds to minutes) — implement async patterns with result polling
AI-generated asset quality varies — build review step before using in production game builds
Prompt engineering for game asset generation is domain-specific — use game art terminology
Official from Ludo-AI org — purpose-built for game developers
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS to Ludo AI API. API key auth. Generated assets belong to user per Ludo's ToS. Review IP ownership terms for commercial game projects.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. API key. Review IP ownership for generated assets in commercial projects.
